Architecture

Backend Architecture

FastAPI backend architecture and design patterns

Backend Architecture

The TraceRTM backend is built with FastAPI following clean architecture principles with clear separation of concerns.

Tech Stack

Core Framework

  • FastAPI - Modern async web framework
  • Python 3.12 - Latest Python with type hints
  • Pydantic - Data validation and serialization
  • SQLAlchemy - ORM for database operations
  • Alembic - Database migrations

Infrastructure

  • PostgreSQL - Primary database
  • Redis - Caching layer
  • NATS - Event streaming
  • uv - Fast package manager

Architecture Layers

Layer 1: API Routes

Location: src/tracertm/api/routers/

FastAPI routers handling HTTP requests:

Layer 2: Services

Location: src/tracertm/services/

Business logic layer:

Layer 3: Repositories

Location: src/tracertm/repositories/

Data access layer:

Layer 4: Models & Schemas

Models (src/tracertm/models/) - SQLAlchemy ORM models:

Schemas (src/tracertm/schemas/) - Pydantic validation models:

Dependency Injection

FastAPI's dependency injection system:

Database Management

Connection Pool

Migrations

Using Alembic for database migrations:

Caching Strategy

Redis caching for frequently accessed data:

Event Publishing

NATS for event-driven architecture:

Error Handling

Centralized error handling:

Authentication & Authorization

JWT-based authentication:

Testing

Unit Tests

Integration Tests

Performance Optimization

Query Optimization

Batch Operations

Background Tasks

Configuration

Using Pydantic Settings:

API Documentation

FastAPI auto-generates OpenAPI documentation:

  • Swagger UI: http://localhost:8000/docs
  • ReDoc: http://localhost:8000/redoc
  • OpenAPI JSON: http://localhost:8000/openapi.json

Best Practices

  1. Type hints everywhere - Leverage Pydantic and ty
  2. Async/await - Use async for I/O operations
  3. Dependency injection - Clean, testable code
  4. Repository pattern - Separate data access
  5. Service layer - Business logic isolation
  6. Error handling - Consistent error responses
  7. Testing - Comprehensive test coverage
  8. Documentation - Auto-generated API docs

Related Documentation

  • API Reference
  • Database Guide
  • Deployment Guide
